kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Search Product Via Search Bar

kw.name: Search Product With Query
Click Search Input
Click Element
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.doc: Clicks on the search input field
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.name: Type In Search Input
kw.doc: Types search term in search input
Performs a search for a product using the search bar
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.name: Verify Search Results Are Available
kw.doc: Verifies that search results are displayed with all expected elements

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify product search functionality displays results with filters
test.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

test.name: TC_002 Add Product To Shopping Cart

kw.name: Search Product With Query
Click Search Input
Click Element
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.doc: Clicks on the search input field
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.name: Type In Search Input
kw.doc: Types search term in search input
Performs a search for a product using the search bar
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart From Results
kw.doc: Navigates through product selection and adds to cart

kw.name: Verify Product Added To Cart Successfully
kw.doc: Verifies that product was successfully added to cart

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify adding a product to cart shows confirmation and updates cart count
test.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='Que recherchez-vous ?']' not found.

test.name: TC_003 Access User Login Page

kw.name: Access User Login Page
Click Login Link
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'Se connecter')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'Se connecter')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'Se connecter')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'Se connecter')]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Verify Login Page Is Displayed Correctly
kw.doc: Verifies that login page contains all required elements

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify accessing login page displays email, password fields and create account link
test.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(), 'Se connecter')]' not visible after 10 seconds.
